verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We once were orphans God came to rescue All that was taken is restored Once left abandoned But now He holds us We are not broken anymore

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh the wonders of His mercy Oh what peace we found

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the heart of the Father There is love He loves us He loves us In the heart of the Father There is love He loves us He loves us

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Children of promise God’s sons and daughters He made us family We are one Now join together To tell the story Of grace unending Perfect love

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Asante baba, Asante Yesu (Thank You Father, Thank You Jesus) Ume tupenda, Tuna shukuru (You Love Us, We thank You)
